topic.title: 동료와의 프로젝트 논의
topic.description: 동료와 프로젝트 진행 상황 및 일정을 논의하는 대화입니다.

korean_scripts.korean_text: 아직 못 봤는데, 오늘 오후에 보려고 합니다. 처음 생각은 어떠신가요?
제 생각에는 **일정이 좀 빠듯한 것 같아요. 일부 마일스톤을 뒤로 미뤄야 할 수도 있습니다.**
제가 걱정했던 부분입니다. 내일 잠시 회의해서 더 자세히 논의할까요?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Hi, have you had a chance to review the Q3 project proposal?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Hi, | have you had a chance to review the Q3 project proposal?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: Not yet, but I plan to look at it this afternoon. What are your initial thoughts?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: Not yet, | but I plan to look at it | this afternoon. | What are your initial thoughts?

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: I think the timeline is a bit aggressive. We might need to push back some of the milestones.
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: I think the timeline is a bit aggressive. | We might need to push back | some of the milestones.

foreign_scripts.foreign_text: That's what I was worried about. Shall we schedule a quick meeting tomorrow to discuss it further?
foreign_scripts.chunked_text: That's what I was worried about. | Shall we schedule a quick meeting | tomorrow | to discuss it further?

highlight_sentences.korean_text: 제 생각에는 일정이 좀 빠듯한 것 같아요. 일부 마일스톤을 뒤로 미뤄야 할 수도 있습니다.
highlight_sentences.foreign_text: I think the timeline is a bit aggressive. We might need to push back some of the milestones.
highlight_sentences.reason: 이 문장은 프로젝트의 잠재적인 일정 충돌 문제를 직접적으로 다루며 동료 간 논의에서 흔히 나오는 주제입니다.
